# organize-docs

**Description:** Maintain docs directory structure and indexes for generated documentation.

## Rules
- Keep generated docs under `docs/components`, `docs/tokens`, `docs/design-system`, and `docs/architecture`.
- Keep generated indexes current after each run.
- Avoid mutating unrelated human-authored docs.
